sections.text: Target an enemy NPC and consume it for 180% Bonus Souls and grants a powerful long lasting buff.

sections.text: Any time you secure or deny a Soul from an entity you get ammo back and gain stacking Spirit Power. At Max Stacks, gain bonus Sprint speed

sections.text: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.

sections.text: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.

sections.text: When you are above 65% health, deal additional Weapon Damage and your bullets reduce enemy Bullet Resist.

description: Your attacks have additional Weapon Damage against enemies above 50% health.

sections.text: Your attacks have additional Weapon Damage against enemies above 50% health.

sections.text: Your next Melee attack heals you. This heal is 30% effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

sections.text: On a successful Parry against an enemy Hero, Heal yourself for the damage parried and returns that damage to the target, and temporarily gain increased damage.

name: Counterspell
description: Your next parry protects you from the damage and effects of enemy abilities and items. On a successful spell parry heal and gain move speed and Spirit.

sections.text: Your next parry protects you from the damage and effects of enemy abilities and items. On a successful spell parry heal and gain move speed and Spirit.

description: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

sections.text: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

description: Deal additional Weapon Damage when in close range to your target.

sections.text: Deal additional Weapon Damage when in close range to your target.

sections.text: Your bullets build up to reduce the target's outgoing damage and apply healing reduction.

sections.text: Launch an expanding projectile which Silences enemies for a short duration and deals impact damage. Silence does not interrupt channeling abilities.

sections.text: Your bullets reduce the target's outgoing spirit damage.
Your bullets build up to a Silence. Victims are immune to the build up for 10s after silence expires.
For the next 4s, all your bullets immediately apply Silence. Silence prevents targets from using abilities.

name: Berserker
description: Your Weapon Damage increases as you take sustained damage.

sections.text: Your Weapon Damage increases as you take sustained damage.
While you are below 50% health, you gain stat bonuses for a duration and existing debuffs on you are reduced.
Your bullets temporarily steal Max HP from enemies. Enemies regain their stolen health when the debuff expires.

description: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals bonus weapon damage.

sections.text: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals bonus weapon damage.

sections.text: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

sections.text: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals bonus weapon damage, heal you, and briefly grants bonus move speed.

sections.text: Your next bullet deals bonus spirit damage.

sections.text: When in close range to your target, gain Weapon Damage and your bullets apply a Movement Slow.

sections.text: Your bullets build up a Bleed on enemies, causing them to lose a percentage of their Max Health over time. Also applies Healing Reduction on the bleeding target.

sections.text: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

description: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

description: Reduces the duration of all negative effects applied to you.

sections.text: Reduces the duration of all negative effects applied to you.

description: Target an enemy to reduce their Spirit Resist and Spirit Power.

sections.text: Target an enemy to reduce their Spirit Resist and Spirit Power.

sections.text: Target an enemy to Silence them. A portion of all damage dealt during the silence gets applied to the target when the silence wears off.

sections.text: Disarms enemy target and reduces their Bullet Resist.

sections.text: Heals a target allied hero and yourself for a percentage of Max Health. Once while healing, you can Pull the target towards you. Can be self-cast.

sections.text: Respawns the hero at the spot they died.
If you die, after 4s you will respawn at your death location with partial health.

name: Decay
description: Inflict damage over time to a target, dealing damage based on their current health. Decay's damage is non-lethal and does not apply item procs.

sections.text: Inflict damage over time to a target, dealing damage based on their current health. Decay's damage is non-lethal and does not apply item procs.

sections.text: Apply Spirit Resist and an aura on a friendly target that deals damage to enemies proportional to their max health. Can be self cast.

description: Apply a Stun after 2s. Stun duration is increased against airborne targets. Increases the target's gravity for the duration of the stun.

sections.text: Apply a Stun after 2s. Stun duration is increased against airborne targets. Increases the target's gravity for the duration of the stun.

sections.text: Teleport to an enemy target and pull them to the ground. Dealing damage, Move speed reduction and Disarm.

description: Teleport straight ahead, gaining Bullet Resist.

sections.text: Teleport straight ahead, gaining Bullet Resist.

description: Reset the cooldown of all your abilities and restore all your charges.

sections.text: Reset the cooldown of all your abilities and restore all your charges.

name: Torment Pulse
description: Periodically deals spirit damage to the closest two enemies nearby.

sections.text: Periodically deals spirit damage to the closest two enemies nearby.

name: Shadow Weave
description: Become Stealthed. Whenever you take damage while Stealthed you get briefly revealed.

sections.text: Become Stealthed. Whenever you take damage while Stealthed you get briefly revealed.
Attacking or using an ability will end your stealth and start an ambush, temporarily granting you bonus Fire Rate, Spirit Power and Melee Damage.

name: Majestic Leap
description: Launch yourself high into the air and grant yourself a Barrier. While in the air, you can use the active again to drop down faster. Cannot be used for 5s if attacked by enemy Hero.

sections.text: Launch yourself high into the air and grant yourself a Barrier. While in the air, you can use the active again to drop down faster. Cannot be used for 5s if attacked by enemy Hero.

name: Healing Nova
description: Heal yourself and nearby allies.

sections.text: Heal yourself and nearby allies.
When an enemy uses an ability within 35mm range from you, store one Restoration Stack. Consume all stacks to heal yourself and replenish up to 3 stamina based on how many stacks you have.

name: Healing Rite
description: Grant Regen and Sprint Speed to the target. Gets dispelled if you take damage from enemy players or objectives. Can be self-cast.

sections.text: Grant Regen and Sprint Speed to the target. Gets dispelled if you take damage from enemy players or objectives. Can be self-cast.

name: Shrink Ray
description: Reduces Model Size and grants Move Speed to the target. Allows usage of tunnels in this mode. Can be self-cast.

sections.text: Reduces Model Size and grants Move Speed to the target. Allows usage of tunnels in this mode. Can be self-cast.

description: Gain Spirit Lifesteal and Spirit Power.

sections.text: Gain Spirit Lifesteal and Spirit Power.

sections.text: Provide the target with a Barrier and temporary Move Speed. Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

name: Divine Barrier
description: Remove all non-stun debuffs from the target and provide them with a Barrier and Move Speed. Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

sections.text: Remove all non-stun debuffs from the target and provide them with a Barrier and Move Speed. Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

name: Alchemical Fire

sections.text: Throw a flask that explodes on contact, creating an area that does increasing spirit damage per second and reduces enemy Bullet Resist. 50% less effective vs non-heroes.

sections.text: Toggle: Continually sacrifice Health to improve fire rate, Debuff Resistance and Move Speed.

sections.text: When you Dash-Jump you gain Fire Rate and bonus Ammo until your next reload. Lasts up to 7s.

sections.text: After you Dash-Jump, the next ability you use within 7s will have bonus Range, Duration, and Spirit Power.

sections.text: Temporarily suppress negative status effects and become immune to Stun, Silence, Sleep, Root, and Disarm. Cannot be used while Stunned or Slept.

sections.text: Grow larger in size, gaining bullet resist, spirit resist, and melee damage. Nearby enemies suffer from slow and have reduced dash speed.

sections.text: Release an expanding ice blast that deals spirit damage and Slows targets it hits.

sections.text: Release an expanding ice blast that deals spirit damage, Freezing and then Slowing targets it hits. Slowed targets have their stamina regen frozen

name: Ethereal Shift
description: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which you float slowly and cannot perform actions. Afterwards you gain Spirit Power, Move Speed, and Spirit Resist. Can be canceled early. Activation cancels any active ability.

sections.text: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which you float slowly and cannot perform actions. Afterwards you gain Spirit Power, Move Speed, and Spirit Resist. Can be canceled early. Activation cancels any active ability.

sections.text: Curses an enemy - interrupting, Silencing, Disarming, and preventing item usage. Removes all non-ultimate buffs.

sections.text: Imbue an ability to increase its Duration.

sections.text: Increases the duration of your abilities and items.

sections.text: Each hero kill grants permanent Fire Rate (up to a max of 8 times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

Grants Lifesteal, Fire Rate, and Ammo. This added Ammo is not limited by your max magazine size.

name: Lifestrike
description: Your Melee Attack applies Movement Slow and heals you for a percentage of the Melee Damage dealt plus a fixed amount. This heal is 40% effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

sections.text: Your Melee Attack applies Movement Slow and heals you for a percentage of the Melee Damage dealt plus a fixed amount. This heal is 40% effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

name: Spirit Strike
description: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, deal extra spirit damage with the attack and reduce the target's Spirit Resist. Cooldown is 2x longer for Light Melee hits.

sections.text: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, deal extra spirit damage with the attack and reduce the target's Spirit Resist. Cooldown is 2x longer for Light Melee hits.

description: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, the attack deals extra spirit damage and steals Spirit Resist and Spirit Power. Effects are reduced by 30% for Light Melee hits.

sections.text: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, the attack deals extra spirit damage and steals Spirit Resist and Spirit Power. Effects are reduced by 30% for Light Melee hits.

description: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage.

sections.text: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage.

sections.text: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage.
Your melee damage will restore ammo and apply a stacking bullet resist debuff on enemies. Heavy melee applies 2 stacks. If the target reaches max stacks, they will be stunned.

sections.text: Upon casting an ultimate ability gain a Barrier and temporary Spirit Power.

sections.text: Dealing spirit damage to enemy Heroes grants you Bonus regeneration. Stacks when dealing damage to different heroes.

sections.text: Briefly gain Fire Rate and Move Speed when one of your bullets hits an enemy hero.

sections.text: When you deal spirit damage to enemies, you also reduce their Fire Rate.

sections.text: Your imbued ability charges up over time with bonus spirit damage, bonus fire rate, and reloads bullets on use.

sections.text: Your imbued ability charges up over time with bonus spirit damage, bonus fire rate, and reloads bullets on use. Until your next reload, your bullets deal bonus spirit damage based on your Spirit Power.

sections.text: Increases Weapon Damage as you continuously fire your weapon.

description: Grants Bullet Resist when your bullets hit an enemy hero. Each shot can only grant one stack.

sections.text: Grants Bullet Resist when your bullets hit an enemy hero. Each shot can only grant one stack.

sections.text: Walking through a cosmic veil grants you Stealth, Heal and increased Move Speed.

description: Gain a Barrier when you are Stunned, Chained, Immobilized, Slept or Silenced.

sections.text: Gain a Barrier when you are Stunned, Chained, Immobilized, Slept or Silenced.

name: Restorative Shot
description: Your next bullet will heal you based on what target you hit.

sections.text: Your next bullet will heal you based on what target you hit.

name: Split Shot
description: Make your weapon fire multishot. Hitting more than one Hero per attack will grant a stacking weapon damage bonus. Targets can only be hit once per multishot.

sections.text: Make your weapon fire multishot. Hitting more than one Hero per attack will grant a stacking weapon damage bonus. Targets can only be hit once per multishot.

name: Active Reload

sections.text: While reloading, pressing Reload during the highlighted portion will instantly finish your reload and grant you Fire Rate, Bullet Lifesteal and Move Speed.

name: Magic Carpet
description: Summon a Magic Carpet that will fly you away. While flying you are immune to slows and doing any action will dismiss the carpet. Cannot use abilities while the carpet is being summoned.

sections.text: Summon a Magic Carpet that will fly you away. While flying you are immune to slows and doing any action will dismiss the carpet. Cannot use abilities while the carpet is being summoned.

name: Hexafoil Ward
description: Block the next spirit damage or Debuff, preventing its effects. Only regenerates outside of combat.

sections.text: Block the next spirit damage or Debuff, preventing its effects. Only regenerates outside of combat.

sections.text: After dealing an accumulated 200 spirit damage, your next Heavy Melee Attack deals an additional 200 spirit damage.

name: Patron's Healing
description: When you receive a Boon, automatically heal.

sections.text: When you receive a Boon, automatically heal.

name: Spirit Burn
description: Dealing significant spirit damage to an enemy within 5s causes an explosion dealing damage and a burn to nearby enemies. While burning, enemies take damage over time and receive reduced healing. Deals half-damage and has half-cooldown on non-heroes.

sections.text: Dealing significant spirit damage to an enemy within 5s causes an explosion dealing damage and a burn to nearby enemies. While burning, enemies take damage over time and receive reduced healing. Deals half-damage and has half-cooldown on non-heroes.

name: Lightning Scroll
description: Damage from your ultimate applies a stun and deals bonus spirit damage after a short delay.

sections.text: Damage from your ultimate applies a stun and deals bonus spirit damage after a short delay.
This effect can only trigger once per target per ultimate.
Mystic Slow effects

name: Soul Explosion
description: Kills or assists cause an explosion where the victim dies. Kills against heroes have greater radius and damage.

sections.text: Kills or assists cause an explosion where the victim dies. Kills against heroes have greater radius and damage.

name: Witchmail
description: Taking heavy hits of spirit damage from an enemy reduces a random ability cooldown.

sections.text: Taking heavy hits of spirit damage from an enemy reduces a random ability cooldown.

name: Healing Tempo
description: Applying heal to yourself or an ally grants the target bonus fire rate and bonus move speed. Does not apply on innate Regen or passive Bullet/Spirit Lifesteals.

sections.text: Applying heal to yourself or an ally grants the target bonus fire rate and bonus move speed. Does not apply on innate Regen or passive Bullet/Spirit Lifesteals.

name: Endless Magazine
description: Gain infinite ammo and bonus fire rate.

sections.text: Gain infinite ammo and bonus fire rate.

name: Glass Cannon v2
description: Each hero kill grants permanent Weapon Damage (up to a max of 0 times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

name: Armor Piercing Rounds
description: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance.

sections.text: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance.

name: Infinite Rounds
description: You have infinite ammo.

sections.text: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance.
You have infinite ammo.

name: Plated Armor
description: Gain a chance to either deflect incoming bullets, preventing all weapon damage or prevent all on-hit effects from bullets.

sections.text: Gain a chance to either deflect incoming bullets, preventing all weapon damage or prevent all on-hit effects from bullets.

name: Spellbreaker
description: The next instance of high spirit damage you take is significantly reduced.

sections.text: The next instance of high spirit damage you take is significantly reduced.
Enemies that shoot you have their Fire Rate slowed.

name: Spellslinger
description: While in-combat whenever you cast an ability or item, gain a stacking buff that improves fire rate and reload speed. Each stack refreshes the duration.

sections.text: While in-combat whenever you cast an ability or item, gain a stacking buff that improves fire rate and reload speed. Each stack refreshes the duration.

name: Stalker
description: Dealing weapon damage at close range opens a wound and grants you bonus move speed. Wounded enemies take spirit damage over time, have reduced bullet resist, and are revealed through walls.

sections.text: Dealing weapon damage at close range opens a wound and grants you bonus move speed. Wounded enemies take spirit damage over time, have reduced bullet resist, and are revealed through walls.

name: Express Shot
description: Your next attack will fire twice in quick succession with increased damage and velocity. This attack consumes extra ammo.

sections.text: Your next attack will fire twice in quick succession with increased damage and velocity. This attack consumes extra ammo.

name: Seraphim Wings
description: When Airborne, You deal more damage and take reduced damage. Allows unlimited Air Dash and Jumping.

sections.text: When Airborne, You deal more damage and take reduced damage. Allows unlimited Air Dash and Jumping.

name: Mystical Piano
description: After a short delay, enemies in the target area will be stunned and have their stamina depleted. After the stun they will be temporarily dazed.

sections.text: After a short delay, enemies in the target area will be stunned and have their stamina depleted. After the stun they will be temporarily dazed.

name: Nullification Burst
description: Removes any positive buffs and prevents stamina usage and healing effects on enemies.

sections.text: Removes any positive buffs and prevents stamina usage and healing effects on enemies.

name: Celestial Blessing
description: Applies an extremely powerful cleanse that replenishes your allies globally.

sections.text: Applies an extremely powerful cleanse that replenishes your allies globally.

name: Eternal Gift
description: Periodically gain a random permanent stat buff.

sections.text: Periodically gain a random permanent stat buff.
Reduces your next death's respawn timer.

name: Mystic Conduit
description: Provides yourself and allies with a powerful spirit focused aura. Has reduced values on allies.

sections.text: Provides yourself and allies with a powerful spirit focused aura. Has reduced values on allies.
Dealing significant Damage to an enemy Hero within 5s causes you to heal yourself and nearby allies.

name: Haunting Shot
description: Your next bullet applies a powerful debuff reducing the enemy's damage output, healing and movement speed. It also deals bonus spirit damage based on the targets current Health. The bullet is larger and penetrates through targets.

sections.text: Your next bullet applies a powerful debuff reducing the enemy's damage output, healing and movement speed. It also deals bonus spirit damage based on the targets current Health. The bullet is larger and penetrates through targets.

name: Cloak of Opportunity
description: Block the next debuff that would apply movement lock, Stun, Chained, Immobilize, or Sleep and become Unstoppable. Also gain a Barrier and bonus move speed

sections.text: Block the next debuff that would apply movement lock, Stun, Chained, Immobilize, or Sleep and become Unstoppable. Also gain a Barrier and bonus move speed

name: Runed Gauntlets
description: Everytime you land a heavy melee, your existing cooldowns get reduced.

sections.text: Pierces through parry.
Everytime you land a heavy melee, your existing cooldowns get reduced.

name: Electric Slippers
description: When sliding, evade bullets, gain fire rate and deal damage to enemies around you. Cooldown is per target.

sections.text: When sliding, evade bullets, gain fire rate and deal damage to enemies around you. Cooldown is per target.

name: Prism Blast
description: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which lasers blast out and rotate around you.

sections.text: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which lasers blast out and rotate around you.

name: Unstable Concoction
description: Consume a concoction that grants you Unstoppable and increased speed, health, spirit and weapon damage. After a short duration you die and explode, stunning nearby enemies and dealing damage based on your maximum health. Dying this way reduces your respawn time by 50%.

sections.text: Consume a concoction that grants you Unstoppable and increased speed, health, spirit and weapon damage. After a short duration you die and explode, stunning nearby enemies and dealing damage based on your maximum health. Dying this way reduces your respawn time by 50%.

name: Frostbite Charm
description: Imbued ability has its Cooldown reduced and gains Spirit Power. When the ability deals damage, freeze the target and apply bonus damage. Cooldown is per target.

sections.text: Imbued ability has its Cooldown reduced and gains Spirit Power. When the ability deals damage, freeze the target and apply bonus damage. Cooldown is per target.

name: Shadow Strike
description: Go Invisible on Stamina use with no detection range. Doing a melee attack while invisible will cause you to steal bullet and spirit resistance from them and deal damage over time.

sections.text: Go Invisible on Stamina use with no detection range. Doing a melee attack while invisible will cause you to steal bullet and spirit resistance from them and deal damage over time.

name: Ballistic Enchantment
description: Imbue an ability with increased range. Dealing damage with that ability grants you increased weapon damage per unique hero hit. Has reduced effect on non-heroes.

sections.text: Imbue an ability with increased range. Dealing damage with that ability grants you increased weapon damage per unique hero hit. Has reduced effect on non-heroes.

name: Recharging Rush
description: Dealing significant weapon damage replenishes a charge for each of your charged abilities.

sections.text: Dealing significant weapon damage replenishes a charge for each of your charged abilities.

name: Golden Goose Egg
description: Gain souls over time, as long as you are alive.

sections.text: Hatch the egg, gaining souls and permanent buffs. The value of the egg grows the longer you hold onto it. Gain a permanent buff per 80 Souls accrued when hatched.
